phases.title: Write analysis report
phases.instructions: Analyze the current state of CI pipeline and document findings in docs/ci-analysis.md.
dod: Verify the analysis document is complete and well-written

ground_truth_rationale: The dod item 'Verify the analysis document is complete and well-written' is natural language, not a shell command. This violates isShellCmd(cmd). Clear NEEDS_REVISION because the violation is unambiguous.
